chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-1272 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For Non-prosecution 05.03.2025 None present for the petitioner nor intimation received and same was position on the last two consecutive dates, thus, the instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
